ddls:
CREATE TABLE "biological_processes" (
  "process_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the biological process */,
  "process_name" TEXT /* Name of the biological process */,
  "go_identifier" TEXT /* Gene Ontology identifier for the process */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the biological process */,
  "references" TEXT /* References or publications related to the process */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the process was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the process record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experimental_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the experimental result */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the biological process */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file containing the result */,
  "expected_value" REAL /* Expected value from the experiment */,
  "actual_value" REAL /* Actual value observed in the experiment */,
  "over_under" TEXT /* Indicates if the actual value is over or under the expected */,
  "fold_enrichment" REAL /* Fold enrichment calculated from results */,
  "raw_p_value" REAL /* Raw p-value from statistical analysis */,
  "fdr" REAL /* False Discovery Rate for the result */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Brief description of the experimental methodology */,
  "date_performed" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was performed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the result was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the result record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experimental_results_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_id") REFERENCES biological_processes ("process_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experimental_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the file */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g., text, CSV, PDF) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file on the server */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the file was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the file record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user within the organization */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for access events */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experimental result being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the result */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES experimental_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the statistic record */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experimental result */,
  "mean_value" REAL /* Mean value of the results */,
  "std_dev" REAL /* Standard deviation of the results */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the mean value */,
  "method" TEXT /* Statistical method used to calculate the metrics */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the statistic was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the statistic record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES experimental_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the annotation */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experimental result */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the annotation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the annotation was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the annotation record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES experimental_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the experiment */,
  "principal_investigator" INTEGER /* User ID of the principal investigator */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment ended */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the experiment was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the experiment record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_principal_investigator FOREIGN KEY ("principal_investigator") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
